judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the existence of a hand-drawn sketch labeled 'Illustration No. 2', a rectangular floor plan, and several labeled circles/arrows with matching specific text like '3/4 mile' and 'Light appeared in this direction', but they disagree on the exact labels of specific elements (e.g., 'A' vs 'C' for the witness/viewing point).
original_image_tags: hand-drawn sketch labeled "Illustration No. 2". A rectangular shape, presumably the house, is drawn in the upper right. A circle labeled "C" (likely the witness position) is drawn to the left. A circle labeled "B" is drawn in the lower right. An arrow labeled "N" points toward the upper left. Dashed lines connect point C to points A (a window on the rectangle) and B. Handwritten annotations along the lines include: "Light appeared in this direction", "3/4 mile", "apparent direction of light", "Disappeared in this direction".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typed page with a hand-drawn sketch diagram in pencil/ink showing a light path, arrows, and circled labels A, B, and C, plus handwritten directional annotations and a small inset box sketch in the upper right.*
